mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, version, bz, feature_name, gdb_path, icon_path, is_release, map_url, mark, name, sort_no, product_path, tree_id, issue, featurename, gdbpath, mapurl, menu, menu_id, storagepath, userid, trigger_param
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO htht_cluster_schedule_product (id,create_time, update_time, version, bz,cycle,feature_name, gdb_path, icon_path, is_release, map_url, mark, name, sort_no, product_path, tree_id, issue, featurename, gdbpath, mapurl, menu, menu_id, storagepath, userid, trigger_param) VALUES (#{id},#{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{version}, #{bz}, #{cycle},#{featureName}, #{gdbPath}, #{iconPath}, #{isRelease}, #{mapUrl}, #{mark}, #{name}, #{sortNo}, #{productPath}, #{treeId}, #{issue}, #{featurename}, #{gdbpath}, #{mapurl}, #{menu}, #{menuId}, #{storagepath}, #{userid}, #{triggerParam})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM htht_cluster_schedule_product WHERE tree_id in
#{item}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_product_info` a LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_product b ON a.product_id = b.id WHERE b.tree_id in
#{item}
mapper.update:
UPDATE htht_cluster_schedule_product
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
version = #{version},
bz = #{bz},
feature_name = #{featureName},
gdb_path = #{gdbPath},
icon_path = #{iconPath},
is_release = #{isRelease},
map_url = #{mapUrl},
mark = #{mark},
cycle = #{cycle},
name = #{name},
sort_no = #{sortNo},
product_path = #{productPath},
issue = #{issue},
featurename = #{featurename},
gdbpath = #{gdbpath},
mapurl = #{mapurl},
menu = #{menu},
menu_id = #{menuId},
storagepath = #{storagepath},
userid = #{userid},
trigger_param = #{triggerParam}
WHERE tree_id = #{id}
